text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fans watch the track with high hopes for the
impressive field gathered to run the autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan's friends are watching too, praying
all her efforts will pay off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For her part, Jordan tells me she's going to run a
race that will change both trends and history.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's going to make the most out of all of her
training and everything she's learned up until
now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells me to keep believing in her as she strives
to become the greatest dummy.
